title: Add fullscreen hamburger menu overlay with navigation links

requirements.summary: Add a fullscreen overlay menu triggered by a hamburger icon on all screen sizes, featuring large navigation links with smooth-scroll behavior, cinematic glassmorphism styling, and smooth animated open/close transitions
acceptanceCriteria: A hamburger icon is visible and clickable on all screen sizes in the navbar
Clicking the hamburger icon opens a fullscreen overlay covering the entire viewport
The fullscreen overlay displays navigation links: Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Testimonials, and Contact
Each link in the fullscreen overlay smoothly scrolls to the corresponding section and closes the overlay
A visible close (X) button dismisses the fullscreen overlay
The overlay open/close transition includes a smooth animated effect (fade, slide, or scale)
The overlay background uses the site's dark cinematic theme (deep charcoal/glassmorphism styling)
The existing desktop navbar links remain visible when the overlay is closed

file_operations.description: Add state management for the fullscreen overlay menu (open/close). Add a hamburger icon button that is visible on all screen sizes and toggles the overlay state. Implement a fullscreen overlay component that covers the entire viewport with a dark glassmorphism background matching the cinematic theme. Inside the overlay, render large navigation links for Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Testimonials, and Contact with smooth-scroll functionality that also closes the overlay after navigation. Add an animated close button (X) in the overlay. Implement smooth animated entrance/exit effects using CSS transitions or Framer Motion (fade-in + slide or scale). Ensure the existing desktop navigation links remain visible alongside the new hamburger icon. Preserve all existing smooth-scroll behavior and section IDs. Maintain visual consistency with the site's deep cinematic dark theme using OKLCH color tokens from the global CSS variables.
